title: Airtable Webhook
description: An Airtable webhook subscription that monitors a base for changes and sends notifications to a specified URL. Webhooks expire after 7 days and must be periodically refreshed.

id.description: The unique identifier for the webhook.

isHookEnabled.description: Whether the webhook is currently active and will process events.

notificationUrl.description: The URL that receives POST notifications when monitored changes occur.

cursorForNextPayload.description: The cursor position indicating the next unread payload. Used when polling for payloads.

areNotificationsEnabled.description: Whether HTTP notifications are currently being sent to the notification URL.

createdTime.description: The time when the webhook was created.

expirationTime.description: The time when the webhook will expire if not refreshed. Webhooks expire 7 days after creation or last refresh.

specification.description: The specification defining which changes the webhook monitors, including data types, field filters, and source options.

dataTypes.description: The types of data changes to monitor.

recordChangeScope.description: The scope of record changes to monitor.

watchDataInFieldIds.description: Specific field IDs to watch for data changes.

watchSchemasOfFieldIds.description: Specific field IDs to watch for schema changes.
